meta.title: Workers' Rooms Augsburg from 12€/Night | Accommodation for Workers
meta.description: Affordable workers' rooms & apartments in central Augsburg. From 12€/person/night. Fully furnished, WiFi, parking. Book directly with the landlord.
meta.titleMonteurapartment: Workers' Apartments Augsburg – Apartments for Tradespeople
meta.titleHouse: Workers' Houses Augsburg – Accommodation for Teams & Groups
meta.titleFair: Trade Fair Accommodation Augsburg – Rooms for Exhibitors

hero.title: Workers' Rooms & Apartments in Augsburg
hero.subtitle: We make sure you feel at home, even when you're far away.

features.wifiDesc: Free high-speed internet in all rooms and common areas.
features.tvDesc: Flat screen TV in every room and common areas.
features.kitchenDesc: Kitchen with stove, oven, microwave, dishes and refrigerator.
features.cleaningDesc: Regular cleaning and fresh bed linen included.
features.washingDesc: Washing machine and dryer available on request.
features.parkingDesc: Free parking spaces right at the building.

pricing.title: Our Prices
pricing.subtitle: Transparent prices – book directly with the landlord, no agency fees.
pricing.seasonNote: Prices vary depending on season and occupancy.

rooms.title: Our Workers' Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Four fully furnished units in a central location in Augsburg.

st5100.name: Workers' Room Augsburg I
st5100.desc: Single, double and triple rooms. Available as apartment for up to 6 persons.

st5200.name: Workers' Room Augsburg II
st5200.desc: Single, double and triple rooms. Available as apartment for up to 7 persons.

st5300.name: Workers' Room Augsburg III
st5300.desc: Single, double and triple rooms. Available as shared housing for up to 7 persons.

st5400.name: Workers' Room Augsburg IV
st5400.desc: Single, double and triple rooms. Available as apartment for up to 12 persons.

location.title: Central Location in Augsburg
location.desc: Our accommodations are located at Barfüßerstraße 7 in the heart of Augsburg. Close to public transport, shops and restaurants. Ideal for tradespeople, workers and project teams.
location.nearCenter: Directly in the Augsburg city center
location.nearTransport: Public transport right at the doorstep
location.nearHighway: Quick access to A8 and B17 highways

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a1: Check-in is from 2:00 PM, check-out by 10:00 AM. Flexible times available by arrangement.
faq.a2: No, we rent from just one night. We offer special rates for longer stays.
faq.a3: Yes, free parking spaces are available right at the building.
faq.q4: Can I book for my whole team?
faq.a4: Of course! We offer accommodation for individuals up to entire teams of up to 20 people.
faq.q5: Are bed linen and towels provided?
faq.a5: Yes, bed linen and towels are included and changed weekly.

form.title: Request a Reservation
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent successfully. We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: There was a problem. Please try again or call us.

fair.title: Trade Fair Accommodation Augsburg
fair.desc: Affordable accommodation for exhibitors, workers and visitors of Messe Augsburg. Our rooms are only 15 minutes from the trade fair and ideal for multi-day fair stays.
fair.adv2: Cheaper than hotels during trade fair season
fair.adv3: Fully furnished with kitchen — save on meals
fair.adv4: Flexible booking periods — even individual fair days possible

apartmentPage.title: Workers' Apartments in Augsburg
apartmentPage.desc: Fully furnished apartments for 4 to 20 persons. Ideal for teams and longer project stays. Each apartment features a fully equipped kitchen, WiFi and weekly cleaning.

monteurapartmentPage.title: Studio Apartments in Augsburg
monteurapartmentPage.desc: Furnished apartments for 1 to 4 persons. Perfect for individuals or small teams who prefer independent accommodation.

housePage.title: Workers' Houses in Augsburg
housePage.desc: Entire houses for teams of 7 to 16 persons. With garden, BBQ area and ample parking. Ideal for larger project teams.

cookie.text: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website.

imprint.title: Legal Notice
imprint.vatNote: VAT identification number according to § 27a of the German VAT Act
imprint.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
